# admin-and-robot

admin.enabled and accounts.* capabilities/enabled map to Server.Accounts

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/accounts/admin-and-robot` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  admin.enabled: "true"
  accounts.alice: apiKey,login
  accounts.alice.enabled: "true"
  accounts.bob: login
  accounts.bob.enabled: "false"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    accounts:
    - enabled: true
      name: admin
    - capabilities:
      - apiKey
      - login
      enabled: true
      name: alice
    - capabilities:
      - login
      name: bob
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  accounts.alice: apiKey,login
  accounts.alice.enabled: "true"
  accounts.bob: login
  accounts.bob.enabled: "false"
  admin.enabled: "true"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
